diagnosis.message: High-urgency response does not state a customer update cadence.
diagnosis.suggested_fix: Require a next-update field for critical and high-priority customer replies.

diagnosis.recommended_fix: Require a next-update field for critical and high-priority customer replies.

trajectory.input_summary: Recommend workflow changes from critic findings, deterministic scores, and final support actions.

recommendations.title: Require owner and update cadence for urgent cases
recommendations.rationale: Critical support replies need an assigned owner and clear update cadence to reduce escalation ambiguity.
recommendations.expected_impact: +6 actionability points and lower SLA risk
recommendations.before: High-urgency drafts can omit next-update timing.
recommendations.after: Critical and high-priority drafts include owner, route, urgency, and next-update timing.
recommendations.problem: High-risk tickets can have an escalation route but no customer-visible update cadence.
recommendations.root_cause: The escalation schema has owner and next_action but the response drafting rule does not require next_update timing.
recommendations.fix: Add mandatory next_update_at or update_cadence fields for critical and high-priority tickets.
recommendations.implementation_hint: Update response_agent.py templates and evaluator.py missing_information rule to require next update language.
